dct_title_s: New York City NYPD Vehicle Stop Reports, 2024
dct_description_sm: New York City NYPD Vehicle Stop Reports, 2024 is a point theme representing vehicular stops by the NYPD in 2024. This dataset was derived from NYC Open Data extracts (from https://data.cityofnewyork.us/Public-Safety/NYPD-Vehicle-Stop-Reports/hn9i-dwpr) in March 2026. Attribute information includes the type of vehicle, demographic information about the driver, the incident location, and flags for vehicle seizure, vehicle search, search consent, vehicle checkpoint, force used, arrest made, and summons issued. Columbia Libraries staff extracted the year's records and converted them to geopackage format by state plane x/y coordinates. Some records may lack geolocation information, and if so they have coordinates 0,0. Columbia Libraries staff has provided the data in the geopackage format, and a codebook and a has been included in the download package.
